abstract: USB.h User-Space  IOUSBFamily message codes  kIOUSBMessageFromThirdParty MacrokIOUSBMessageFromThirdPartyMac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.3+#define kIOUSBMessageFromThirdPartyDiscussionMessages specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_msg(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.

-  kIOUSBMessageFromThirdParty 

Macro# kIOUSBMessageFromThirdParty

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.3+

```
#define kIOUSBMessageFromThirdParty
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/kiousbmessagefromthirdparty#discussion)

Messages specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_msg(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.
